summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of OCB TITAN Retail AI System v3 - Role & Permission, AI Business, User Management, Multi-role access control. Fixed 1 backend bug in performa-cabang endpoint.

fixed.issue: KeyError: 'code' when some branches don't have code field
fixed.fix: Changed branch['code'] to branch.get('code', '-') in ai_business.py line 355

critical_code_review_comments: All 15 menu items display correctly for owner role in Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)
Role-based sidebar filtering working correctly - Cashier sees only 3 menus, Supervisor sees 10 menus
AI Bisnis page has 7 tabs all functioning: Insight Penjualan, Rekomendasi Restock, Produk Terlaris, Produk Lambat, Analisa Stok, Performa Cabang, Rekomendasi Bisnis
Role & Hak Akses page shows all 6 default system roles: Pemilik, Administrator, Supervisor, Kasir, Keuangan, Gudang
Branch restriction working - Cashier 'Budi Kasir' sees 'Cabang 1 - Banjarmasin' data only

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load and function correctly

seed_data_creation: 6 default roles created in MongoDB on first load
context_for_next_testing_agent: OCB TITAN Retail AI System fully functional. New features tested: 1) AI Bisnis menu with 7 tabs, 2) Role & Hak Akses with 6 default roles, 3) Pengguna page with full CRUD and filters, 4) Multi-role access control working (owner/admin/supervisor/cashier), 5) Branch-based data restriction for cashier role.

features_verified.sidebar_14_menus: PASS - 15 menus displayed in Indonesian for owner: Dashboard, Kasir, Produk, Stok, Pembelian, Supplier, Pelanggan, Keuangan, Akuntansi, Laporan, AI Bisnis, Cabang, Pengguna, Hak Akses, Pengaturan
features_verified.ai_bisnis_page: PASS - All 7 tabs working: Insight Penjualan, Rekomendasi Restock, Produk Terlaris, Produk Lambat, Analisa Stok, Performa Cabang, Rekomendasi Bisnis
features_verified.role_hak_akses: PASS - 6 default roles displayed: Pemilik, Administrator, Supervisor, Kasir, Keuangan, Gudang
features_verified.pengguna_page: PASS - User management with filters (role, branch, status), add/edit/reset password/delete buttons
features_verified.kasir_login: PASS - kasir@ocb.com sees only 3 menus (Dashboard, Kasir, Pelanggan)
features_verified.kasir_branch_filter: PASS - Dashboard shows 'Cabang 1 - Banjarmasin' for kasir
features_verified.supervisor_login: PASS - supervisor@ocb.com sees 10 menus with medium access
features_verified.dashboard_ai_insights: PASS - AI Insights widget displayed on dashboard
features_verified.all_pages_no_error: PASS - All 10 core pages navigated without errors

ai_business: GET /api/ai-bisnis/performa-cabang - Branch performance (200 OK after fix)
